name: pi-cc-compact
description_en: Ports Claude Code's compaction prompt (9-section <analysis>+<summary>) to pi's session_before_compact hook. Faithful reconstruction of the leaked full-compact prompt.
description_zh: 将 Claude Code 的压缩提示（9 部分 <analysis>+<summary>）移植到 pi 的 session_before_compact 钩子中。忠实重建泄露的完整压缩提示。
